<svg width="48" height="48" viewBox="-10.2941 -10.2941 44.5884 44.5884" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect x="-10.2941" y="-10.2941" width="44.5884" height="44.5884" rx="15" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.1"/>
    <style>
        @keyframes popup {
            0% {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: scale(0);
            }
            100% {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: scale(1);
            }
        }
        #vuedotjs-logo {
            animation: popup 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.68, -0.55, 0.265, 1.55) forwards;
        }
    </style>
    <g id="vuedotjs-logo">
    <title>Vue.js</title><path fill="currentColor" d="M24,1.61H14.06L12,5.16,9.94,1.61H0L12,22.39ZM12,14.08,5.16,2.23H9.59L12,6.41l2.41-4.18h4.43Z" />
    </g>
</svg>
